action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed with best val WR=0.5915 (ep7). Multiple checkpoints available (best.pt, snapshots ep4/9/14, swa.pt). Previous best test WR=0.4651 with val WR=0.5878. Analysis: Snapshot ensembling + TTA can reduce variance and improve OOD generalization, especially for worst-region metric. This is the most impactful change without retraining. Decision: Update predict.py with multi-checkpoint ensembling + 4-way TTA, submit eval immediately.
action.command: python -c "from model import CLIPClassifier; import torch; m = CLIPClassifier(62); sd = torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False); print('Keys type:', type(sd)); print('Top keys:', list(sd.keys())[:10] if isinstance(sd, dict) else 'not a dict'); new_sd = {k.replace('module.',''):v for k,v in (sd['model_state_dict'] if 'model_state_dict' in sd else sd).items()}; m.load_state_dict(new_sd); print('Model loaded OK')"
